subject: Re: News from Geneva
body:
call lesley ,,  IO will wire you 6000 euro's monday

----- Original Message ----
From: balerina simona <balerinasimona@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, February 10, 2007 3:17:43 PM
Subject: News from Geneva

Dear Jeaffrey,
  I am not even sure where to start. I'll try to be "to the point". I feel
uncomfortable asking you for more help. At this time of year ballet
companies start auditions for dancers. Any day I have to be ready to go to
auditions but I have no financial means to do so. I have left just enough to
pay for room and board and a few pairs of point shoes...
I could get a job but I spend too much time at a studio (sometimes even on
Sunday)as I take part in some performances. At the given time I must
concentrate only on the dance as my primary purpose coming to Geneva was to
be accepted to some company.
    I thought that everything will be easier but I was mistaken. At the
present time I feel like I am falling. These application denials are
weakening my self confidence. Sometimes I  am scared when I think that I
may not be able to get in a ballet company. I got to face competition, 
unfairness,
jealousy and the fact that everywhere (even in the art) one must have
contacts.
I know - I must be patient, close my eyes and go forward seeking my goal. I
know - sooner or later I will taste the fruit of my work.
    Thank you for your time that you took to read this letter and sorry
to ask you for help - finance support, again.I am appreciat for your 
decision.
    Devoted friend,ballerina Simona. Big kiss.

_________________________________________________________________
